title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Intel House Limited
body: "Application number 5401  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by Intel House Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 31 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Intel House Limited is changed to 16215114, Ltd. "
